frames.image_prompt: Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery interior, behind a worn wooden counter. Extreme close-up of a pair of weathered hands covered in burn scars, slowly peeling a faded handwritten menu off a dimly lit wall. The wall shows clean rectangular outlines where other menus once hung. Warm amber light from a single pendant lamp casts soft shadows. Shallow depth of field, focus on the scarred fingers gripping the yellowed paper.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery 'Mo Shi', behind the counter. A male figure, 45-50 years old, gray-white short hair slightly disheveled, yellowish healthy skin, lean build with slightly hunched shoulders, wearing a faded navy chef coat with rolled-up sleeves revealing burn scars on forearms. He stands holding a neat stack of folded handwritten menus, his weary gaze directed toward the entrance where a handwritten 'CLOSED PERMANENTLY' sign in Chinese characters hangs on the glass door. Warm tungsten light from overhead, the empty restaurant stretches behind him. Medium close-up, slight low angle.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery entrance. Over-the-shoulder shot from behind a male figure with gray-white disheveled short hair wearing a faded navy chef coat. He is looking down at the counter, not turning around. In the background, the glass door is pushed open, rain pouring outside. A female figure, 28-32 years old, pale skin, slender build, stands in the doorway silhouetted against blue-gray rain. Wet black long hair draped over her shoulders, wearing a beige trench coat glistening with rainwater. Cold blue rain light floods through the open door, contrasting with the warm interior.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery entrance. Medium shot of a young woman, 28-32 years old, pale skin, slender build, standing in the rain-soaked doorway. Wet black long hair draped over her shoulders, wearing a beige trench coat dripping with water. On her right wrist, a vivid jade green bracelet catches the warm interior light, standing out against the cold rain behind her. Her expression is calm but determined. She does not move to leave. Rain streams down the glass door behind her. Cold blue backlight from the street, warm fill from the restaurant interior.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery bar counter. A young woman, 28-32 years old, pale skin, slender build, wet black long hair draped over shoulders, wearing a beige trench coat, jade bracelet on right wrist, sits at a worn wooden bar counter. Small droplets of rainwater fall from the tips of her hair onto the dark wooden surface, forming tiny pools. She speaks with her lips slightly parted, eyes downcast. Warm overhead pendant light illuminates the counter surface. Medium shot from a slight side angle, shallow depth of field on the water droplets.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery bar counter. Two-shot across the counter. A male figure, 45-50 years old, gray-white short hair slightly disheveled, yellowish healthy skin, lean with slightly hunched shoulders, faded navy chef coat with rolled sleeves revealing burn scars, stands behind the counter. He has just looked up, eyes narrowed with suspicion and wariness. Across from him sits a young woman with wet black hair and a beige trench coat. Warm pendant light between them. Medium shot, eye-level, the counter creating a visual barrier between the two characters.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery bar counter. Extreme close-up of a man's face, 45-50 years old, gray-white short disheveled hair, yellowish skin. His eyes are wide, pupils dilated in shock. Breathing visibly quickened, lips slightly parted. Dramatic chiaroscuro lighting — a single hard light source from the side creates deep shadows across half his face. The background is thrown into complete bokeh. His expression conveys sudden, overwhelming recognition.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery interior. Close-up of a bare wall section with a clean, unfaded rectangular outline where handwritten menus once hung. The surrounding wall is slightly yellowed and aged. A few folded menu papers lie scattered on the dark wooden floor below. Dramatic spotlight-like warm light falls on the blank wall space, creating an almost memorial quality. The emptiness is stark and symbolic.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery bar counter. Close-up of a man's trembling scarred hand gripping a woman's slender right wrist. On the wrist, a vivid jade green bracelet gleams under warm light. The man — 45-50 years old, gray-white disheveled short hair, faded navy chef coat, lean with hunched shoulders — leans forward with his whole body tense like a drawn bow. His face shows a mix of shock and desperate anger. The woman's pale hand remains still, not resisting. Dramatic overhead light creates stark shadows. The bar counter edge is visible in the lower frame.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery bar counter. Medium shot of a young woman, 28-32 years old, pale skin, slender build, wet black long hair draped over shoulders, beige trench coat. Her right wrist is held by someone off-frame. With her free left hand, she has drawn a smartphone from her coat pocket, its screen glowing white-blue. Her expression is solemn, eyes carrying a heavy sense of duty and sorrow. She looks directly at the man off-camera with quiet resolve. Dramatic warm-cold mixed lighting — the phone screen casts cool light on her chin while warm pendant light falls from above.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery bar counter. Close-up of a man, 45-50 years old, gray-white disheveled short hair, yellowish skin, faded navy chef coat, collapsed onto a bar stool. His eyes are reddened and glistening with tears. Lips trembling. Silent tears stream down his weathered cheeks. His hands hang limp at his sides, all strength gone. Cold blue-white light washes over him from the rain-streaked window behind, where neon signs outside blur into soft, dreamlike halos through the wet glass. The phone's faint audio glow is visible in the foreground bokeh.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery bar counter. Two-shot from a low angle. A man, 45-50 years old, gray-white disheveled hair, faded navy chef coat with rolled sleeves showing burn scars, sits slumped on a bar stool, weeping silently, face contorted with grief. Across from him, a young woman, 28-32, pale skin, wet black hair, beige trench coat, holds a phone between them, its screen faintly glowing. She watches him with quiet empathy, tears in her own eyes. Rain-streaked window behind them, neon halos in the wet glass. Cold ambient light dominates with warm accent from the pendant lamp above.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery bar counter. Medium shot of a young woman, 28-32 years old, pale skin, slender build, wet black long hair, beige trench coat, standing beside the counter. She gently places a kraft paper envelope — slightly worn, brown, with no visible writing — onto the dark wooden counter surface. Her jade bracelet is visible on her right wrist. Her expression is one of solemn completion, a mission fulfilled. Warm pendant light illuminates the envelope and her hands. The seated man is partially visible in the background, slumped on the stool.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery entrance. Medium-long shot from inside the restaurant looking toward the door. A young woman, 28-32, slender, wet black long hair, beige trench coat, walks toward the glass door, her back to the camera. The jade bracelet glints faintly on her right wrist. Through the glass door, rain continues to fall in the dark street. In the foreground left, the silhouette of a man slumped on a bar stool. The door chime hangs above. Warm interior light fades toward the cold blue of the rainy street beyond the door.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery interior, empty. A lone man, 45-50 years old, gray-white disheveled short hair, yellowish skin, lean with slightly hunched shoulders, faded navy chef coat with rolled sleeves revealing burn scars, stands at the glass entrance door. His right hand rests on a hanging paper sign that reads 'CLOSED PERMANENTLY' in Chinese characters. His fingertips trace the edge of the paper. Seen from behind at a medium distance, the empty restaurant stretches behind him — vacant stools, bare walls where menus once hung. Warm pendant lights glow softly in the quiet space.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery glass entrance door, interior view. Close-up of a weathered hand with burn scars flipping a hanging paper sign. The sign now shows the side reading 'OPEN' in Chinese characters, facing outward through the rain-streaked glass. Through the door, the rainy night street is visible with soft neon reflections on wet pavement. The man's face is partially reflected in the glass — gray-white hair, reddened eyes, a faint, trembling hint of resolve. Warm interior light illuminates the sign from behind.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Late-night eatery bar counter, empty. Close-up overhead shot looking straight down at the worn dark wooden counter surface. A kraft paper envelope lies alone in the center, untouched, slightly worn at the edges. Through one corner of the envelope, the faint outline and edge of a photograph peeks through the paper. A few dried rainwater marks dot the wood around it. Warm, dim pendant light falls softly on the envelope, creating gentle shadows. The rest of the frame fades into darkness at the edges, vignetting naturally. The mood is quiet, suspended, full of unresolved mystery.
